args.query:
SELECT trim(to_char(createddate, 'Month')) AS month_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM "Case"
WHERE replace(trim(orderitemid__c), '#', '') IN ('802Wt0000078yuGIAQ','802Wt00000790mOIAQ','802Wt00000790zGIAQ','802Wt00000794F2IAI','802Wt000007968eIAA','802Wt00000796bfIAA','802Wt00000796qFIAQ','802Wt0000079734IAA','802Wt00000797W5IAI','802Wt00000797z7IAA','802Wt00000798YdIAI','802Wt00000798okIAA','802Wt0000079B0EIAU')

args.query:
SELECT extract(month from createddate::timestamp)::int AS month_num, trim(to_char(createddate::timestamp, 'Month')) AS month_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM "Case"
WHERE replace(trim(orderitemid__c), '#', '') IN ('802Wt0000078yuGIAQ','802Wt00000790mOIAQ','802Wt00000790zGIAQ','802Wt00000794F2IAI','802Wt000007968eIAA','802Wt00000796bfIAA','802Wt00000796qFIAQ','802Wt0000079734IAA','802Wt00000797W5IAI','802Wt00000797z7IAA','802Wt00000798YdIAI','802Wt00000798okIAA','802Wt0000079B0EIAU')
  AND createddate >= '2020-06-10'::date
  AND createddate <= '2021-04-10'::date
GROUP BY month_num, month_name
ORDER BY month_num;

args.query:
SELECT extract(month from createddate::timestamp) AS month_num, trim(to_char(createddate::timestamp, 'Month')) AS month_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM "Case"
WHERE replace(trim(orderitemid__c), '#', '') IN ('802Wt0000078yuGIAQ','802Wt00000790mOIAQ','802Wt00000790zGIAQ','802Wt00000794F2IAI','802Wt000007968eIAA','802Wt00000796bfIAA','802Wt00000796qFIAQ','802Wt0000079734IAA','802Wt00000797W5IAI','802Wt00000797z7IAA','802Wt00000798YdIAI','802Wt00000798okIAA','802Wt0000079B0EIAU')
  AND createddate BETWEEN '2020-06-10' AND '2021-04-10'
GROUP BY month_num, month_name
ORDER BY month_num;
